items.hook: 这类洗护很多时候不是不会送，而是怕这次范围没说清。
items.bridge: 洗护里真正决定下一步的，通常是件数、材质和时间窗口。
items.next_step: Ask for item count, material, and preferred time.
items.handoff_suggestion: If clear facts arrive, move to Catcher.

items.hook: 这种情况先把时间和范围锁住，会比先看一堆套餐更省心。
items.bridge: 换季、婚礼和返校场景通常还会牵涉材质、取送和时效，所以先收窄范围更重要。
items.next_step: Ask for date, item count, and the main washing priority.
items.handoff_suggestion: Route deadline cases toward Catcher then Dispatcher.

items.hook: 先把最担心的点讲清楚，比急着比价格更有帮助。
items.bridge: 很多缩水、串色和赔付问题，只有把材质和主要顾虑说出来，才能回答得更稳。
items.next_step: Ask what the main concern is and what kind of items these are.
items.handoff_suggestion: Trust-sensitive cases should carry a risk tag.

items.hook: 这种情况先判断来不来得及，比先看一堆价格更关键。
items.bridge: 急洗通常要先锁时间、件数和是否愿意先洗重点件。
items.next_step: Ask which time, what items, and whether a narrower urgent scope would work.

items.hook: 补洗这件事很多时候不是重新选，而是先把这次要补哪一类说清。
items.bridge: 续洗更看重路线、时间和是否还是之前那种服务。
items.next_step: Ask whether this is a rewash, the usual route, and the timing.
items.handoff_suggestion: Repeat cases can route to Catcher or Followup.

items.hook: 第一次送洗先把件数和时间说清，反而更容易轻松一点。
items.bridge: 不用一上来就决定工艺，先把件数、材质和最晚时间收窄就够了。
items.next_step: Ask for item count, material, and preferred delivery time.
items.handoff_suggestion: Route to Catcher when basics are complete.
